program: Crowns of Code Youth Coding Program

lineItems.description: Lead Instructor (0.5 FTE) — curriculum delivery, lesson planning, student assessment
Assistant Instructors (2 part-time) — classroom support, small-group facilitation
lineItems.notes: $20/hr x 10 hrs/week x 40 weeks, split between two assistants

lineItems.description: Curriculum development — original lesson plans, exercise design, instructional materials
lineItems.notes: Contract curriculum designer for age-appropriate coding content

lineItems.description: Student supplies — notebooks, printed materials, take-home activity kits
lineItems.notes: ~$50 per student for 40 students across sessions

lineItems.description: Equipment — tablets, Chromebooks, or laptops for classroom use
lineItems.notes: 15 devices at ~$400 each; reusable across cohorts

lineItems.description: Software licenses — Scratch, code.org premium, educational coding platforms
lineItems.notes: Annual licenses for interactive coding environments

lineItems.description: Snacks and meals — healthy snacks for after-school sessions, meals for full-day workshops
lineItems.notes: ~$8 per student per session, estimated 375 student-sessions

lineItems.description: Field trips — visits to tech companies, museums, or tech events (2 per year)
lineItems.notes: Transportation, admission fees, and chaperone costs for 2 field trips

lineItems.description: End-of-program showcase — student demo day, certificates, family celebration event
Recruitment and outreach — flyers for schools and community centers, social media, parent info sessions
lineItems.notes: Targeting Brooklyn schools and community organizations

lineItems.description: Classroom space rental — after-school and weekend session venue
lineItems.notes: Community center or school space rental; some sessions at WBB HQ

lineItems.description: Background checks and safety compliance — instructor and volunteer screening
lineItems.notes: Required for all adults working with youth

lineItems.description: Insurance — supplemental youth program liability coverage
lineItems.notes: Additional coverage beyond general organizational policy

lineItems.description: Administrative overhead — accounting, reporting, office supplies
